## All tools

| Tool | Description length | First sentence |
|---|---|---|
| `apply_patch` | 4992 ⚠️ over 1000 | Build a Hydrasynth patch atomically: apply a sparse override map on top of the factory INIT buffer and dump via SysEx to the named slot. |
| `apply_preset` | 1124 ⚠️ over 1000 | Build or replace the entire working-buffer preset in one call. |
| `describe_device` | 986 ⚠ | REQUIRED first call for any device question or apply_preset call. |
| `find_compatible_types` | 746 ⚠ | Given a block + knob names you plan to write, return the subset of block.type values that expose EVERY listed knob (AND-semantics). |
| `get_param` | 761 ⚠ | Read one parameter from a device in display units (knob 0..10, dB, ms, %, enum name). |
| `get_params` | 434 | Batch-read parameters from a device. |
| `get_preset` | 1187 ⚠️ over 1000 | Snapshot the active working buffer in one tool call. |
| `init_patch` | 412 | Reset the active patch to factory INIT state. |
| `list_midi_ports` | 579 | List every MIDI input + output port the OS exposes. |
| `list_params` | 976 ⚠ | Enumerate a device's parameters with units and display ranges. |
| `lookup_lineage` | 1149 ⚠️ over 1000 | Look up authored lineage data for a block type: what real hardware it models, manufacturer notes, developer/forum quotes. |
| `reconnect_midi` | 947 ⚠ | You almost never need this. |
| `save_preset` | 429 | DESTRUCTIVE: persist the working buffer to a stored location, optionally renaming first. |
| `scan_locations` | 593 | Bulk-read stored preset names across a location range. |
| `send_cc` | 304 | Send a MIDI Control Change to any CC-responsive device. |
| `send_chord` | 243 | Play a chord: multiple simultaneous MIDI notes with a shared duration. |
| `send_clock_continue` | 201 | Send MIDI Timing Clock Continue (0xFB) to resume a stopped sequencer / drum machine from its current position. |
| `send_clock_start` | 278 | Send MIDI Timing Clock Start (0xFA) to start a sequencer / drum machine / clock-aware synth from the beginning. |
| `send_clock_stop` | 150 | Send MIDI Timing Clock Stop (0xFC) to halt a running sequencer / drum machine / clock-aware synth. |
| `send_note` | 213 | Play one MIDI note on any note-responsive device (synth, drum pad, sampler). |
| `send_nrpn` | 237 | Write an NRPN on any NRPN-responsive device. |
| `send_panic` | 251 | MIDI panic: silence every stuck note on every channel of a device. |
| `send_program_change` | 184 | Switch patches on any PC-responsive device. |
| `send_reset_controllers` | 243 | Reset All Controllers (CC 121) on a channel: pitch bend, mod wheel, expression, channel pressure, etc. |
| `send_sequence` | 321 | Play a timed sequence of MIDI notes (arpeggios, riffs, test patterns). |
| `send_song_position` | 252 | Send MIDI Song Position Pointer (0xF2): jump a sequencer / drum machine to a specific beat. |
| `send_sysex` | 316 | Send a raw SysEx frame. |
| `set_block` | 1000 ⚠ | Place ONE block (or clear a slot) on a LINEAR-DEVICE preset. |
| `set_bypass` | 381 | Silence (bypassed=true) or activate (bypassed=false) a block on the currently-active scene. |
| `set_macro` | 425 | Set a Macro control (CCs 16-23 on the Hydrasynth; CC range varies by device). |
| `set_macro_route` | 881 ⚠ | Assign one of a performance Macro's destinations by NAME (Hydrasynth macro page: each Macro 1-8 has up to 8 destinations). |
| `set_mod_route` | 821 ⚠ | Wire one modulation-matrix route by NAME on a synth with a mod matrix (e.g. |
| `set_param` | 996 ⚠ | Write one parameter, addressed by (block, name) in display units (knob 0..10, dB, ms, %, enum name or wire index). |
| `set_params` | 559 | Batch-write parameters on a device. |
| `set_system_param` | 374 | Set a device-level system CC (master volume, sustain pedal, expression, mod wheel, all-notes-off). |
| `switch_preset` | 402 | Load a stored preset into the working buffer. |
| `switch_scene` | 336 | Change the active scene within the current preset. |
| `translate_preset` | 713 ⚠ | Translate a preset spec from one layout-class device (AM4 / Axe-Fx II / III) to another. |
